summary: Plan-only classification for five open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are permitted. #93981 is the best current onboard-health-hint candidate but cannot be recommended for merge without mergeability refresh and Codex /review preflight. #93865 has a concrete contributor-branch repair path. #93972 needs maintainer judgment because the hydrated Codex review raises an unresolved Slack API behavior blocker. #93942 is independent docs work. #93976 is superseded by the stronger onboard candidate.

actions.reason: Superseded by #93981 for the onboard health-hint path, but closure is blocked in this plan job.
Repair the contributor branch before any merge decision: remove unrelated file churn, resolve lint, refresh mergeability, run review, and validate the Mattermost test path.
Create an executable repair artifact for #93865 rather than opening an unrelated replacement PR.
Maintainer judgment is needed on the Slack API behavior and whether this approach is acceptable before repair or merge planning.
Independent docs work; do not close or merge from this mixed remediation shard without maintainer review/preflight.
Best onboard-health-hint candidate, but not a merge_candidate until live mergeability and Codex /review preflight are complete.
